title: Hide Armors
description: Hide Armors From Showing! Compatible with other packs.
body:
# Hide Armor
![A Player with armor equipped, but transparent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9d91dc94c41bcf1af4bcfde770cb0243bfb1c0d.png)

## What it does?
- Hides visible armor (Visuals only!)
- Supports a wide range of Minecraft versions
- Compatible with [The Copper Age](https://minecraft.wiki/w/The_Copper_Age)

## Before Download
This resource pack overrides armor item models with flat 2D versions.
This behavior ensures compatibility with other resource packs and is intentional, not a "bug".

### Troubleshooting

<details>
<summary>Armor trims are not displaying correctly with other resource packs</summary>

Make sure this resource pack is placed above other resource packs in the order.

</details>

</details> <details> <summary>Netherite helmet trim is not showing properly</summary>

This is a known issue. I'm trying to fix it.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Other issues</summary>

If you encounter any additional problems, please contact:
📧 main@sungsoos.kr

</details>
